narration: Counting Bits builds the answer array from smaller earlier answers.
callout: Each new value reuses an older one instead of recounting from scratch.

narration: For value 5, shift right to get 2 and then add the last bit of 5.
decision: That is the rule: bits[i] = bits[i >> 1] + (i & 1).

predictionPrompt.prompt: What does (i & 1) add to the Counting Bits rule?

choices.label: Whether the last bit is 1
choices.feedback: Correct. It tells what the removed last bit contributed.

choices.label: The whole bit count from scratch
choices.feedback: Not this one. The earlier shifted answer already handles the rest.

narration: This lesson shows how bit tricks and dynamic programming can work together.
callout: That combination makes the whole array fast to build.
